SELECT MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, GROUP_CONCAT(ThuText || ' ' || TietText || ' phong ' || MaPhong, '; ') AS LichKhop, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT Buoi) AS BuoiText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT MaPhong) AS PhongText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TenGV) AS TenGV, TrangThaiLHP, MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_lich
WHERE MaMH = :ma_mh AND CoTheDangKy = 1 AND Buoi = :buoi
GROUP BY MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, TrangThaiLHP
ORDER BY MIN(Thu), MIN(TietBD), TenMH, Nhom

rows.TenCTDT: Chương trình đào tạo HCMUTE - Công nghệ thông tin

gold_sql:
SELECT MaSV, HoTen, TrangThaiSV, MaKhoaHoc, TenKhoaHoc, MaCTDT, TenCTDT, MaNganh, TenNganh
FROM v_sinh_vien_day_du
WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
ORDER BY MaSV
user_question: Hồ sơ sinh viên 22110074 đang theo ngành nào và CTĐT nào?

gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT mh.MaMH, mh.TenMH, mh.SoTC, mh.TenNganh, mh.LoaiYC, mh.HKGoiY
FROM v_mon_hoc_ctdt mh
JOIN v_sinh_vien_day_du sv ON mh.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND mh.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
ORDER BY mh.HKGoiY, mh.TenMH
user_question: Theo CTĐT của mình, học kỳ 3 nên học những môn nào?

gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT mh.MaMH, mh.TenMH, mh.SoTC, mh.TenNganh, mh.LoaiYC, mh.HKGoiY
FROM v_mon_hoc_ctdt mh
JOIN v_sinh_vien_day_du sv ON mh.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND mh.LoaiYC = :loai_yc AND mh.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
ORDER BY mh.HKGoiY, mh.TenMH
user_question: Chỉ lấy các môn bắt buộc trong danh sách đó.

gold_sql:
SELECT tq.MaMH, tq.TenMH, tq.MaMHTQ, tq.TenMHTQ
FROM v_tien_quyet_day_du tq
LEFT JOIN v_ket_qua_hoc_tap_sv kq ON kq.MaSV = :ma_sv AND kq.MaMH = tq.MaMHTQ AND kq.KetQua = 'DAT'
WHERE tq.MaMH = :ma_mh AND kq.MaMH IS NULL
ORDER BY tq.MaMHTQ

SELECT DISTINCT mh.MaMH, mh.TenMH, mh.SoTC, mh.TenNganh, mh.LoaiYC, mh.HKGoiY
FROM v_mon_hoc_ctdt mh
JOIN v_sinh_vien_day_du sv ON mh.MaCTDT = sv.MaCTDT
WHERE sv.MaSV = :ma_sv AND mh.LoaiYC = :loai_yc AND mh.HKGoiY = :hoc_ky
ORDER BY mh.HKGoiY, mh.TenMH
user_question: Chỉ lấy các môn bắt buộc trong danh sách đó.

gold_sql:
SELECT tq.MaMH, tq.TenMH, tq.MaMHTQ, tq.TenMHTQ
FROM v_tien_quyet_day_du tq
LEFT JOIN v_ket_qua_hoc_tap_sv kq ON kq.MaSV = :ma_sv AND kq.MaMH = tq.MaMHTQ AND kq.KetQua = 'DAT'
WHERE tq.MaMH = :ma_mh AND kq.MaMH IS NULL
ORDER BY tq.MaMHTQ
user_question: Nếu chưa được thì thiếu môn tiên quyết nào?

gold_sql:
SELECT MaSV, HoTen, MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, SoTC, NamHoc, HocKy, TrangThaiLHP, LichHocText, BuoiText, ThuText, TenGV, TGDK, LoaiDangKy
FROM (
    SELECT dk.MaSV, dk.HoTen, dk.MaLHP, dk.MaMH, dk.TenMH, dk.Nhom, dk.SoTC, dk.NamHoc, dk.HocKy, dk.TrangThaiLHP, dk.TGDK, dk.LoaiDangKy, lhp.LichHocText, lhp.BuoiText, lhp.ThuText, lhp.TenGV
    FROM v_dang_ky_hien_tai_sv dk
    LEFT JOIN v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du lhp ON lhp.MaLHP = dk.MaLHP
)
WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv
ORDER BY HocKy, TenMH, Nhom

    SELECT dk.MaSV, dk.HoTen, dk.MaLHP, dk.MaMH, dk.TenMH, dk.Nhom, dk.SoTC, dk.NamHoc, dk.HocKy, dk.TrangThaiLHP, dk.TGDK, dk.LoaiDangKy, lhp.LichHocText, lhp.BuoiText, lhp.ThuText, lhp.TenGV
    FROM v_dang_ky_hien_tai_sv dk
    LEFT JOIN v_lop_hoc_phan_day_du lhp ON lhp.MaLHP = dk.MaLHP
)
WHERE MaSV = :ma_sv AND MaMH = :ma_mh AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
ORDER BY HocKy, TenMH, Nhom

SELECT MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, GROUP_CONCAT(ThuText || ' ' || TietText || ' phong ' || MaPhong, '; ') AS LichKhop, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT Buoi) AS BuoiText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT MaPhong) AS PhongText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TenGV) AS TenGV, TrangThaiLHP, MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_lich
WHERE MaMH = :ma_mh AND HocKy = :hoc_ky
GROUP BY MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, TrangThaiLHP
ORDER BY MIN(Thu), MIN(TietBD), TenMH, Nhom

SELECT MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, GROUP_CONCAT(ThuText || ' ' || TietText || ' phong ' || MaPhong, '; ') AS LichKhop, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT Buoi) AS BuoiText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT MaPhong) AS PhongText, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TenGV) AS TenGV, TrangThaiLHP, MAX(SoChoCon) AS SoChoCon
FROM v_lop_hoc_phan_lich
WHERE MaMH = :ma_mh AND HocKy = :hoc_ky AND CoTheDangKy = 1 AND Buoi = :buoi
GROUP BY MaLHP, TenMH, Nhom, TrangThaiLHP
ORDER BY MIN(Thu), MIN(TietBD), TenMH, Nhom
